<?php use Pest\TestSuite; beforeEach(function () { $this->snapshotable = <<<'HTML' <div class="container"> <div class="row"> <div class="col-md-12"> <h1>Snapshot</h1> </div> </div> </div> HTML; }); test('pass with dataset', function ($data) { TestSuite::getInstance()->snapshots->save($this->snapshotable); [$filename] = TestSuite::getInstance()->snapshots->get(); expect($filename)->toStartWith('tests/.pest/snapshots-external/') ->toEndWith('pass_with_dataset_with_data_set____my_datas_set_value___.snap') ->and($this->snapshotable)->toMatchSnapshot(); })->with(['my-datas-set-value']); describe('within describe', function () { test('pass with dataset', function ($data) { TestSuite::getInstance()->snapshots->save($this->snapshotable); [$filename] = TestSuite::getInstance()->snapshots->get(); expect($filename)->toStartWith('tests/.pest/snapshots-external/') ->toEndWith('pass_with_dataset_with_data_set____my_datas_set_value___.snap') ->and($this->snapshotable)->toMatchSnapshot(); }); })->with(['my-datas-set-value']);
